name: Butterscotch Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped walnuts, pecans, or almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Melt butter in a large saucepan. Add sugar and beat well to mix.
3. Allow the mixture to cool slightly, then beat in the eggs and vanilla extract.
4. Sift together flour, salt, and baking powder. Stir into the wet ingredients, then add the chopped nuts. Mix until combined.
5. Spread brownies evenly in a greased 11 x 7 x 2-inch (28 x 18 x 5 cm) pan.
6. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until lightly golden. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then turn out onto wax paper and let cool completely on a rack.
To make frosting:
1. Cream together 1/2 cup butter and confectioners' sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in instant coffee dissolved in hot water (2 tablespoons).
3. Spread frosting over cooled brownies.
4. Allow frosting to set before cutting into squares.
Yield: 3 dozen 2-inch squares or 6 dozen 1-inch squares.
